array.string:
set -euo pipefail
VPS_HOST="Administrator@43.163.107.158" SSHPASS_BIN="/opt/homebrew/bin/sshpass" SSH_OPTS="-o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=20 -o BatchMode=no" FAIL_FILE="/tmp/aismc_health_fails" MAX_FAILS=3 export SSHPASS='Lcc5201314^^'
timestamp() { date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'; }
# Read current fail count if [ -f "$FAIL_FILE" ]; then FAILS=$(cat "$FAIL_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) else FAILS=0 fi
# Query healthz via SSH (avoids needing port 8080 open externally) RESPONSE=$("$SSHPASS_BIN" -e ssh $SSH_OPTS "$VPS_HOST" \ "curl -s --max-time 10 http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz" 2>/dev/null) || RESPONSE=""
OK=0 if echo "$RESPONSE" | grep -q '"ok":true'; then OK=1 fi
if [ "$OK" -eq 1 ]; then echo "[$(timestamp)] HEALTHY: $RESPONSE" echo 0 > "$FAIL_FILE" else FAILS=$((FAILS + 1)) echo "$FAILS" > "$FAIL_FILE" echo "[$(timestamp)] FAIL #$FAILS: response='$RESPONSE'"
if [ "$FAILS" -ge "$MAX_FAILS" ]; then MSG="AI-SMC VPS healthz failed $FAILS times in a row. Check the VPS." echo "[$(timestamp)] ALERT: $MSG" osascript -e "display notification \"$MSG\" with title \"AI-SMC Health Alert\" sound name \"Basso\"" \ 2>/dev/null || true # Reset counter after alert so we don't spam every 10 min forever # (will alert again after another MAX_FAILS consecutive failures) echo 0 > "$FAIL_FILE" fi fi
